messages.body:
Hi Rahil,

We completed the first round of testing for the new analytics dashboard in Nimbus CRM. Overall performance is good, but we're seeing slow page loads when customers have more than 100k records. The average response time jumps from 1.2s to around 5.8s.

Can you review the API and database queries when you get a chance? We'd like to finalize the optimization plan before deployment.

Quick update — after adding indexes, response time dropped to about 3.4s. It's an improvement, but we're still above our target.

I think it would help if we walk through the remaining bottlenecks together. Are you available for a 30-minute meeting on 23 June at 3:00 PM IST? We can review the profiling results and decide the next steps.

Hi Rahil,

We're preparing Sprint 8 for Project Atlas. The authentication module is complete, and the notifications feature is about 80% finished. The remaining work is mainly around reporting and role-based permissions.

Could you review the sprint backlog and let me know if we should move any items into the next sprint?

Also, it might be easier to discuss this over a quick call instead of a long email thread.

Would 23 June at 11:00 AM IST work for you? We can finalize the sprint scope and assign the remaining tasks.

Hi Rahil,

I've finished testing the latest version of the AI Resume Analyzer. Resume parsing accuracy has improved to around 94%, but the skills extraction still misses some certifications and project keywords.

I think we should review the prompt and embedding strategy before releasing the next version.

I've prepared comparison reports between the current model and the updated prompt version.

Can we meet on 23 June at 4:00 PM IST for about 30 minutes? It'll be easier to review the results together and decide whether the new prompt is ready for production.
